motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution:
def minSumSquareDiff(nums1, nums2, k1, k2):
    sum_diff = 0
    for i in range(len(nums1)):
        diff = abs(nums1[i] - nums2[i])
        if diff > sum_diff and k1 > 0:
            nums1[i] += 1
            k1 -= 1
            sum_diff = diff
        elif diff > sum_diff:
            nums2[i] -= 1
            k2 -= 1
            sum_diff = diff
    return sum_diff

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
